backstory.original: Desmond stands an absolutely towering 5 foot 10 inches. He was inflicted with lycanthropy as a teenager on a hunt for food. While it's taken him a long time to do so, he's finally accepted his curse and savors any opportunity to unleash the beast inside if the situation arises... It often does.
backstory.display: 戴斯蒙德的身高达到了 5 英尺 10 英寸。他十几岁时在寻找食物时染上了兽化症。他为此困扰了很久，但最终接受了这个诅咒。一旦遇到必要情况，他会立即释放内心的野兽并享受这种乐趣......但他经常遇到这种“必要情况”。

description.original: Desmond shoots the closest enemy with his hand crossbow, knocking them back a bit.
description.display: 戴斯蒙德用手弩射击离他最近的敌人，将敌人稍微击退。

longDescription.original: Desmond shoots the closest enemy with his hand crossbow, knocking them back a bit.
longDescription.display: 戴斯蒙德用手弩射击离他最近的敌人，将敌人稍微击退。

description.original: Desmond attacks the enemy with the most health 3 times in his werewolf form. Buffing Noble Heart.
description.display: 戴斯蒙德在狼人形态下攻击生命值最高的敌人 3 次，并提升贵族之心的增益。

longDescription.original: Desmond transforms into his Werewolf form and leaps at the enemy with the most hit points. He swipes with both claws, then bites them, then returns to formation and back to human form. Noble Heart gets a +300% increase for 30 seconds.
longDescription.display: 戴斯蒙德化身为狼人，扑向生命值最高的敌人。 它用双爪猛击并撕咬敌人，之后返回阵型中并恢复成人形。贵族之心的增益在 30 秒内提升 300%。

description.desc: Increases the damage of Champions adjacent to $(source_hero) by $(amount)%.
所有与$(source_hero)相邻的勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害。

description.pre: $(source_hero) synergizes with the Moon Phases reducing the attack cooldown of himself and adjacent champions. The closer to the Full Moon the more the cooldown is reduced. At the start of each Full Moon, $(source_hero)'s Ultimate cooldown fully resets.

conditions.desc: ^^Current Moon Phase: $(desmond_current_moon_phase)^Next Moon Phase In $(desmond_time_till_next_moon_phase)^Base Attack Cooldown Reduction: $(amount___2)

description.pre: $(source_hero)与月相同调，减少自己和相邻勇士的攻击冷却时间。满月越近，冷却时间减少越多。在每次满月开始时，$(source_hero)的杀招冷却时间完全重置。

conditions.desc: ^^当前月相：$(desmond_current_moon_phase)^下次月相：$(desmond_time_till_next_moon_phase)^基本攻击冷却时间减少：$(amount___2)

tipText.original: Desmond synergizes with the phases of the Moon. Increasing the base attack speed of Champions closer to the Full Moon.
tipText.display: 戴斯蒙德与月相同调，为靠近满月的勇士提升基本攻击速度。

description.pre: The dark side of the moon increases the effect of Noble Heart dependent on how close the New Moon is.
月之暗面会根据距离新月到来的时间增加贵族之心的效果。

description.desc: The moon cycle of Howl at the Moon is twice as fast, recharging $(source_hero)'s ultimate attack more often.
对月咆哮的月相周期变化速度加倍，$(source_hero)的杀招攻击将更加频繁。

specializationDescription.original: Desmond focuses on his synergy with the moon speeding up all phases, making his ultimate available more frequently.
specializationDescription.display: 戴斯蒙德专注于在所有月相阶段提升他与月亮的同调速度，使他的杀招更频繁地出现。

description.desc: Additively increases the base attack cooldown reduction that $(source_hero)'s Howl at the Moon provides by 0.5 seconds. In addition, the full moon of Howl at the Moon takes 30 seconds, while the new moon and crescent moons only take 10 seconds.
提升$(source_hero)的对月咆哮提供的基本攻击冷却缩减 0.5 秒（加算）。此外，满月时对月咆哮需要 30 秒，而新月和弯月只需要 10 秒。

specializationDescription.original: Desmond focuses on his synergy with the Full Moon, speeding up his allies more frequently.
specializationDescription.display: 戴斯蒙德专注于他与满月的同调，更频繁地为盟友提升速度。

description.desc: Devotion in Dark Times gets an +$(amount___2)% additive buff. In addition, the new moon of Howl at the Moon takes 30 seconds, while the full moon and gibbous moons only take 10 seconds.
暗中奉献得到 +$(amount___2)% 的额外加成。此外，新月时对月咆哮需要 30 秒，而满月和盈月只需要 10 秒。

specializationDescription.original: Desmond focuses on his synergy with the New Moon. Buffing his allies damage more frequently.
specializationDescription.display: 戴斯蒙德专注于他与新月的同调，更频繁地加成盟友的伤害。

description.desc: Increase the effect of Noble Heart on Lycanthropes, Druids, and Black Dice Society Champions by $(amount)%.
为兽化人、德鲁伊和黑骰子协会勇士提升贵族之心效果 $(amount)%。

$(source_hero) increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount___2)%, stacking multiplicatively, for each slot in the formation that contains a dead or undead Champion or is taken up by an escort character or object.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Increases the damage of $target by $(not_buffed amount)%

description.desc: 阵型中每有一个栏位包含已死亡勇士或亡灵勇士，或被护卫角色或物体占据，$(source_hero)令所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount___2)%（以乘算方式堆叠）。

effect_keys.stack_title: 被护卫对象和已死亡勇士

tipText.original: Desmond buffs all Champion damage based on the number of slots that are blocked by a dead champion or escort.
tipText.display: 戴斯蒙德根据被死去的勇士或护卫队所占用的格子，增加所有勇士的伤害。

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrade_add_flat_amount,0.2,7300,1","description":"Additively increases the base attack cooldown reduction that $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) provides by $(seconds_plural amount)"}
{"effect_string":"buff_upgrade_add_flat_amount,40,7301","description":"Additively increases the effect of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%"}

description.original: I am what I am, and Koshmarr deserves more.
description.display: 我就是我，科什马尔应该得到更多。

description.original: We're not going to sit there and just take it!
A pack runs together, hunts together, dies together.
description.display: 狼群一起奔跑，一起狩猎，一起死亡。

description.original: The deeper into the Shadowfell we go, the louder the call.
description.display: 我们越深入堕影冥界，召唤的声音就越响亮。

description.original: Some call it a curse, I call it 'myself.'
description.display: 有人称之为诅咒，我称之为“我自己”。

effects.description: Additively increases the base attack cooldown reduction that $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) provides by $(seconds_plural amount)

description.original: Even in the shadow, Selûne casts her light.
description.display: 即使藏在阴影中，塞伦涅也能投射出她的光芒。

effects.description: Additively increases the effect of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: My party is like my family.
My dearest were taken from me. I will avenge them.
description.display: 我最亲爱的人被夺走了，我要报仇。

description.original: There's something wild in all of us.
description.display: 我们所有人心中都有野性。
走开，让我自己继续悲伤吧。

description.original: When I lead, you should follow.
description.display: 我领导的时候，你就该跟随。

description.original: All are welcome in this pack.
description.display: 这个集体欢迎所有人加入。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by 20% for each unique species in the formation, stacking additively.

name.display: 戴斯蒙德之枪戴斯蒙德

character_sheet_details.backstory: Desmond stands an absolutely towering 5 foot 10 inches. He was inflicted with lycanthropy as a teenager on a hunt for food. While it's taken him a long time to do so, he's finally accepted his curse and savors any opportunity to unleash the beast inside if the situation arises... It often does.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Desmond buffs the party based on the current phase of the moon. He also buffs the party for any blocked formation slots.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 戴斯蒙德的身高达到了 5 英尺 10 英寸。他十几岁时在寻找食物时染上了兽化症。他为此困扰了很久，但最终接受了这个诅咒。一旦遇到必要情况，他会立即释放内心的野兽并享受这种乐趣......但他经常遇到这种“必要情况”。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 戴斯蒙德根据当前的月相来增益队伍，如果阵型中有被外物占据的格子，他也能为队伍提供增益。

original.name: Crossbow
original.description: Desmond shoots the closest enemy with his hand crossbow, knocking them back a bit.
